bibliographic_info.title: A new PPP one-way timing approach via BDS-3 PPP-B2b and short-message communication service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement 240 (2025) 115557 Contents lists available at ScienceDirect Measurement journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement A new PPP one-way timing approach via BDS-3 PPP-B2b and short-message communication service Yong Wanga,b,c,d, Yulong Ged, Weiping Jianga,b,*, Tianjun Liua,b,c aGNSS Research Center, Wuhan University, 129 Luoyu Road, Wuhan 430079, China bHubei L

Based on the BDS-3 PPP service (PPP-B2b) and the global short PPP-B2b message communication (GSMC) service, this study proposes a novel PPP one-way timing method that is not Global short-message communication subject to distance limitations or the requirements of network communication.
